revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23368769069|time triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_United_Kingdom%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_United_Kingdom%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Documentation subpage}}
<kbd>Country_data</kbd> templates are also available for the following subdivisions and dependencies of the United Kingdom:

==== [[Constituent countries of the United Kingdom|Constituent countries]] ====
{| style="background-color:#ecfcf4"
| [[Template:Country data England]] || {{flag|England}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Northern Ireland]] || {{flag|Northern Ireland}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Scotland]] || {{flag|Scotland}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Wales]] || {{flag|Wales}}
|}

==== [[Crown Dependencies]] ====
{| style="background-color:#ecfcf4"
| [[Template:Country data Guernsey]] || {{flag|Guernsey}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Isle of Man]] || {{flag|Isle of Man}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Jersey]] || {{flag|Jersey}}
|}

==== [[:en:British Overseas Territories|British Overseas Territories]] ====
{| style="background-color:#ecfcf4"
| [[Template:Country data Akrotiri and Dhekelia]] || {{flag|Akrotiri and Dhekelia}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Anguilla]] || {{flag|Anguilla}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Bermuda]] || {{flag|Bermuda}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data British Antarctic Territory]] || {{flag|British Antarctic Territory}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data British Indian Ocean Territory]] || {{flag|British Indian Ocean Territory}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data British Virgin Islands]] || {{flag|British Virgin Islands}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Cayman Islands]] || {{flag|Cayman Islands}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Falkland Islands]]|| {{flag|Falkland Islands}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Gibraltar]] || {{flag|Gibraltar}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Montserrat]] || {{flag|Montserrat}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Pitcairn Islands]] || {{flag|Pitcairn Islands}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Saint Helena, Ascension and Tristan da Cunha]] || {{flag|Saint Helena, Ascension and Tristan da Cunha}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands]] || {{flag|South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Turks and Caicos Islands]] || {{flag|Turks and Caicos Islands}}
|}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
}}</includeonly>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Country data templates of countries|United Kingdom]]
[[Category:Country data templates of the United Kingdom| ]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
